hooks.command: echo '[Design guardrail] Before proposing or applying ANY design or refactor: (1) READ the governing CLAUDE.md for the repo you are touching — the central file AND the working-repo CLAUDE.md (service-delivery-backend/frontend/simulator); they are not auto-loaded from central, so Read them. (2) Invoke /solid-principles (and /clean-architecture for layer questions) for the authoritative rules. Derive from SOLID first; composition is the default, inheritance needs an explicit is-a or framework-hierarchy reason and the rejected alternative named. Do not rely on memory — read the files.'
f=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); case "$f" in */.claude/*) /Users/rrios/dev/ServiceDelivery/scripts/utils/validate-ai-system.sh --quiet 1>&2 || exit 2 ;; esac
